minimum_float32_promotion_bound.reason: ONNX Einsum has one tensor type T for all inputs and output; at minimum B/O/Hs/ac must widen from counted float16 to float32.

algebra.proof: The Einsum operand list and corresponding LHS terms are permuted together.
The Einsum operand list and corresponding LHS terms are permuted together.

algebra.rejection: Changes raw algebra and moves positive 0.25 to forbidden 0.125.
Finite and known-safe, but changes two real coefficients.

impossibility_conclusion.reason: A known valid input has exact real final values below -65504. Every algebra-identical float16 final output must therefore be nonfinite; widening the common Einsum type has a cost lower bound above 1947.
